pass_threshold: every dimension >= 1 AND all gate dimensions = 2

dimensions.criterion: Exactly one playbook loaded; topic in enum; ambiguity resolved by asking not guessing.
Every non-obvious claim has exactly one tag from the loaded playbook's family; no family mixing.
Market/competitor figures are [DOC]/[EXPLICIT] only with source + date; else downgraded.
No concrete price; FTE-months / ranges / placeholders only.
One brand per artifact with correct token set; no client PII; contact intel public-channel only.
The loaded playbook's own acceptance checklist is satisfied.
Findings and recommendations are specific and tied to evidence, not filler.
depth=deep ran the playbook's Validate step; depth=quick delivered the headline artifact only.
